steps.title: Express total savings after t years
steps.content:
After t years, the cumulative savings equals:
$$(4,334 - 2,712) \cdot t$$

steps.title: Set up inequality for when savings exceed installation cost
steps.content:
The cumulative savings must exceed the \$25,000 installation cost:
$$(4,334 - 2,712) \cdot t > 25,000$$
Rearranging:
$$25,000 < (4,334 - 2,712) \cdot t$$
This matches choice B — B is correct.
